web.title: Xodo Sign Plans Explained for 2026 | Pricing, Features, API
web.description: Compare all Xodo Sign plans for 2026. See monthly and annual prices, advanced features, API tiers, and which plan is best for your workflow.
web.markdown:
[Back](https://eversign.com/blog) [![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/68c40b2aea4ce2b761fa3411_68bec84de97e607985d16fb6_circle-dashed-svgrepo-com%201%202.svg)\\ \\ General](https://eversign.com/tag/general) March 18, 2026 5 min read # Xodo Sign Pricing Plans Explained (2026) This 2026 guide breaks down every Xodo Sign plan: Free, Basic, Professional, Enterprise, and API tiers. You’ll find pricing, document limits, included features, ideal use cases, and considerations for teams or high‑volume workflows. ![Xodo Sign Pricing Plans Explained (2026)](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69ba66cc4120b18fc32a37d8_Blog%20Banner%2018.png) ## Table of contents [Xodo Sign eSignature plans](https://eversign.com/blog/eversign-plans-explained#xodo-sign-esignature-plans) [Xodo Sign API plans](https://eversign.com/blog/eversign-plans-explained#xodo-sign-api-plans) [Which Xodo Sign plan should you choose?](https://eversign.com/blog/eversign-plans-explained#which-xodo-sign-plan-should-you-choose) Sign and send unlimited e-signatures with Xodo Sign. [Try Free](https://eversign.com/trial) At [Xodo Sign](https://eversign.com/) (formerly eversign) we offer flexible plans for individuals, teams, and large organizations. All plans include access to the core eSignature workflow: preparing, sending, signing, and managing documents online. Below is a full breakdown of each eSignature and API plan. ## Xodo Sign eSignature plans | Plan | Price
(billed annually) | Documment Volume | Best For | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Free | $0 | Low | Occasional users | | Basic | $10/month | Light | Freelancers, micro-business | | Professional | $16/month | Medium | Growing teams | | Entreprise | Custom | High | Large organizations | | API Plans | Custom | Very high | SaaS and custom integrations | ‍ ### Free plan **Price** Free **Document Limit** Send up to 3 documents per month (suitable only for occasional signing). **Features** - Prepare and sign documents - 1 reusable template - Send documents for signature - Standard audit trail - Works on any device **Best for** Individuals who sign a few documents per month and don’t need team features or higher volume. ### Basic plan **Price** - **$20/month** when billed monthly - **$10/month** when billed yearly (50% savings) **Document Limit** Sign and send an unlimited number of documents each month. ![Xodo Sign basic plan details](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69baad6a7e1f5a929d24679d_2026-03-18-14-49-05.png) **Features** - 3 reusable templates - LTV enabled - Mobile app - App integrations - Basic support **Best for** Freelancers and small businesses sending documents regularly but without complex routing. ### Professional plan **Price** - **$32/month** when billed monthly - **$16/month** when billed yearly (50% savings) **Document Limit** No limits. Edit, sign, and send as many documents as you need. ![Xodo Sign Professional plan](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69baad946d50edfbfad0e0a0_2026-03-18-14-49-52.png) **Features** Includes all Basic features, plus: - Unlimited templates - 10 bulk sending credits (per user) - 10 SMS credits (per user) - Advanced PDF editing - AI summarization - Custom branding - In-person signing - Premium support **Best for** Growing teams and businesses that need PDF editing, custom branding, team controls, and higher document capacity. ### Enterprise plan **Price** Custom pricing. [Get a demo](https://eversign.com/demo). **Document Limit** Unlimited document volume. ![Xodo Sign Enterprise plan details](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69baadc5804f16984deffc45_2026-03-18-14-50-43.png) **Features** Everything in Professional, plus: - Volume templates - Bulk document sending - Volume SMS credits - Additional seats - Dedicated support **Best for** Enterprises or industries with strict compliance needs in legal, [finance](https://eversign.com/financial-services), real estate, construction, and other regulated sectors. ## Xodo Sign API plans We offer standalone [API subscriptions](https://eversign.com/api) for developers and companies that want direct integration with their software. ### API Sandbox **Price** Free **Document Limit** 2 production API documents. **Best for** Developers testing Xodo Sign’s API, building proof-of-concept integrations, or evaluating how to connect eSignature workflows to internal systems before committing to a paid tier. ### API Light **Price** - **$100/month** when billed monthly - **$50/month** when billed yearly (50% savings) **Document Limit** Send and collect 50 signed documents through the API. ![Xodo Sign API Light plan details](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69baae11f85409aac97fc897_2026-03-18-14-51-39.png) **Features** - 5 users - 10 templates - LTV enabled - 20 SMS credits (per user) - Bulk document sending - In-person signing - Dedicated support **Best for** Small SaaS platforms, internal tools, and companies that automate moderate-volume document workflows and need reliable API access without enterprise-level scale. ### API Business **Price** Custom pricing. [Get a demo](https://eversign.com/demo). **Document Limit** Custom monthly API documents. ![Xodo Sign API Business plan details](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69baae299fbd346cdd5231d2_2026-03-18-14-51-54.png) **Features** Includes all Light features, plus: - Volume users - Unlimited templates - Volume SMS credits - Custom branding - Additional seats - Custom solutions **Best for** Large platforms, enterprise software teams, or organizations that require scalable API usage, advanced customization, and integration with CRMs, ERPs, or proprietary systems. ## Which Xodo Sign plan should you choose? - Choose **Free** if you only sign documents occasionally. - Choose **Basic** if you run a small business requiring regular sending. - Choose **Professional** if you need branding and team workflows. - Choose **Enterprise** if you require strict compliance or advanced controls. - Choose **API Plans** if you're embedding signatures in your app or workflows. If you have any questions, [contact us for assistance](https://eversign.com/contact). ![Kieran Lee](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69836aee54f2f093d9f5575c_kieran-lee-bio.webp) Kieran Lee [Link to the Author LinkedIn profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kieran-lee-3255475a/) Kieran Lee has worked in the e‑signature industry for several years, beginning his career at eversign before its evolution into Xodo Sign. Since then he has developed a deep expertise in digital document workflows, secure signing processes, and an understanding of how organisations adopt and scale e‑signature technology. [Read more](https://eversign.com/author/kieran-lee) posts by this author. ## Read Similar Posts [Link to blog template](https://eversign.com/blog/what-is-an-affidavit) ![What is an Affidavit? ](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/6937427391d29640b94e5043_Blog%20Banner%2040.png) [![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/68bec84de97e607985d16fb6_circle-dashed-svgrepo-com%201.svg)\\ \\ General](https://eversign.com/tag/general) March 6, 2026 5 min read ### What is an Affidavit? Get a clear look at what an affidavit is and how it functions in everyday situations. This guide covers key definitions, common uses, examples, and a brief look at managing an affidavit online. ![Reena Cruz](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69b84cda9c91f7f6b0f91537_reena-cruz-xodo-sign-profile5.jpg) Reena Cruz [Link to blog template](https://eversign.com/blog/what-is-a-service-contract) ![What is a Service Contract? ](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69aafea0e5758442a8b4e1e2_Blog%20Banner%2039.png) [![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/68bec84de97e607985d16fb6_circle-dashed-svgrepo-com%201.svg)\\ \\ General](https://eversign.com/tag/general) March 6, 2026 5 min read ### What is a Service Contract? Learn what a service contract is, how it protects both parties, and the essential elements every agreement should include. We explore service contracts across different industries and take a look at how you can work with service contracts from start to finish. ![Kieran Lee](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69836aee54f2f093d9f5575c_kieran-lee-bio.webp) Kieran Lee [Link to blog template](https://eversign.com/blog/wet-signature) ![What is a Wet Signature and When Should You Use One?](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/68c7fdf53926033e582fa789_wet-signature.jpeg) [![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/68bec84de97e607985d16fb6_circle-dashed-svgrepo-com%201.svg)\\ \\ General](https://eversign.com/tag/general) November 14, 2025 5 min read ### What is a Wet Signature and When Should You Use One? Learn the differences between a wet signature and an electronic one, when each is appropriate, and how Xodo Sign can transform the entire signing process with digital and secure audit trails, reminders, and compliance. ![Reena Cruz](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/689f286a5c39ed6e32721d70/69b84cda9c91f7f6b0f91537_reena-cruz-xodo-sign-profile5.jpg) Reena Cruz [Read All Articles](https://eversign.com/blog)

web.title: Plans & Pricing | Xodo Sign (formerly eversign)
web.description: XodoSign offers flexible and scalable eSignature plans for any business. Starts at $10 per month. API access available.
web.markdown:
# Plans that Scale With Your Business

Get started with competitive, scalable Xodo Sign plans designed for solo users, small teams, and growing businesses.

Monthly Billing

Yearly Billing

Save 50%

[eSignature Plans](https://eversign.com/pricing#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-0) [API Plans](https://eversign.com/pricing#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-1)

## Basic

Make use of core e-signature features. Ideal for individuals and small teams.

$10/mo

Seats

E-signature

[Get Started](https://app.eversign.com/signup/yearly/basic/1)

[Contact Sales](https://eversign.com/pricing#pricing-quote)

What's included:

- Unlimited Documents



Send and collect an unlimited number of signed documents each month.

- 3 Templates (per user)



Create up to 3 reusable templates for frequently used documents with predefined fields and recipients.

- LTV Enabled



Ensure long-term validation of document signatures for ongoing legal and compliance needs.

- Mobile App



Review, sign, and send documents on the go with the Xodo app for iOS and Android devices.

- App Integrations



Connect Xodo Sign with tools like Zapier, Dropbox, and Gmail to streamline your document workflows.

- Basic Support



Get standard customer support from our trained team during regular business hours.


Popular

## Professional

Enjoy the full suite of advanced e-signature and PDF editing tools.

$16/mo

Seats

E-signature + Advanced Editing + AI

[Get Started](https://app.eversign.com/signup/yearly/professional/1)

[Contact Sales](https://eversign.com/pricing#pricing-quote)

Everything in Basic, plus:

- Unlimited Templates



Create and reuse an unlimited number of templates with predefined recipients and fields for faster sending.

- 10 Bulk Sending credits (per user)



Send documents to multiple recipients at once. Includes 10 credits per user each month.

- 10 SMS Credits (per user)



Verify signer identity via SMS. Includes 10 credits per user each month, with additional credits available.

- New







Advanced PDF Editing



Redact, annotate, reorder, and edit documents with a full set of advanced tools, all in one workflow.

- AI Summarizer



Instantly generate summaries of contracts and complex business documents with Xodo AI.

- Custom Branding



Apply your brand’s logo and brand colors to emails, interfaces, and signer experiences.

- In-Person Signing



Collect signatures on-site using any device, ideal for meetings, events, or fieldwork.

- Premium Support



Get premium and more personalized help from our expert support team.


## Enterprise

Tailored solutions for complex needs. Contact us for a custom quote.

Custom

E-signature + Advanced Editing + API

[Get a Custom Quote\\
\\
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/687f66800b85e8425ceb6cfc/68934c792ec99b24ba6e16ad_Rectangle%20861.webp)\\
\\
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/687f66800b85e8425ceb6cfc/68934c78d6f1d4e8d4c37a01_Rectangle%20862.webp)](https://eversign.com/pricing#pricing-quote)

Everything in Professional, plus:

- Volume Templates



Use high-volume template workflows to standardize and streamline recurring documents across teams.

- Bulk Document Sending



Send documents in bulk using templates. This feature requires API documents allowance or overage billing enabled.

- Volume SMS Credits



Authenticate signer identity with flexible SMS credit usage. You can add more SMS credits for an additional cost, overages billed next month.

- Additional Seats



Invite additional users to collaborate, send documents, and manage workflows within your account.

- Dedicated Support



Get access to a dedicated support specialist for fast, tailored assistance when you need it.


## API Sandbox

Try API Sandbox for free.

Free

[Get Started](https://app.eversign.com/api/signup)

What's included:

- 2 production API documents



Get started with up to 2 signed documents using our API, ideal for testing and low-volume needs.


Popular

## API Light

The most common API integration for up to 50 monthly e-Signature requests.

$50/mo

[Get Started](https://app.eversign.com/api/signup/light)

What's included:

- 50 API Documents



Send and collect 50 signed documents each month through the API.

- 10 Templates



Create up to 10 reusable templates with predefined fields and recipients to speed up document creation.

- LTV Enabled



Ensure long-term validation of document signatures for ongoing legal and compliance needs.

- 20 SMS Credits (per user)



Verify signer identity via SMS. Includes 20 credits per user each month, with additional credits available.

- 5 Users



Allow up to 5 users to access and manage your API-integrated document workflows.

- Advanced Integrations



Connect with advanced third-party tools and services to extend your document automation capabilities.

- Bulk Document Sending



Send documents in bulk using templates. This feature requires API documents allowance or overage billing enabled.

- Dedicated Support



Get access to a dedicated support specialist for expert API-related assistance.

- In-Person Signing



Collect signatures on-site using any device, ideal for meetings, events, or fieldwork.


## API Business

Sign up for a custom API subscription plan tailor-made for your business.

Custom

[Get a Custom Quote\\
\\
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/687f66800b85e8425ceb6cfc/68934c792ec99b24ba6e16ad_Rectangle%20861.webp)\\
\\
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/687f66800b85e8425ceb6cfc/68934c78d6f1d4e8d4c37a01_Rectangle%20862.webp)](https://eversign.com/pricing#pricing-quote)

Everything in Light, plus:

- Unlimited Templates



Create unlimited reusable templates with predefined fields and recipients to speed up document creation.

- Volume SMS Credits



Authenticate signer identity with flexible SMS credit usage.  You can add more SMS credits for an additional cost, overages billed next month.

- Volume Users



Add more team members to manage documents and API workflows without user limitations.

- Custom Branding



Apply your brand’s logo and brand colors to emails, interfaces, and signer experiences.

- Additional Seats



Invite additional users to collaborate, send documents, and manage workflows within your account.

- Custom Solutions



Work with our Sales team to create a custom API package tailored to your specific integration and volume needs.

## FAQs

Find answers to your questions about using Xodo Sign for electronic signatures and document management.

### Is Xodo Sign really free?

Yes. With the [Free Plan](https://app.eversign.com/signup), you can send and sign up to 3 documents per month. If you need to send more or access advanced features such as document editing and AI summarization, start your [free trial of the Professional Plan](https://eversign.com/trial).

### Can I upgrade, downgrade and cancel anytime?

Yes, just like throughout the signup process you will be able to upgrade and downgrade your subscription level as well as change your payment frequency at any time and how many times you like.

### Do I need a credit card?

No. You don’t need a credit card to use Xodo Sign on the Free Plan. If you choose to upgrade to a Professional or Enterprise Plan later, you can easily add your billing details through your account dashboard.

### Are my documents safe?

Yes. Your documents are safe with Xodo Sign. We use [256-bit HTTPS encryption](https://help.eversign.com/support/solutions/articles/35000294820) and monitor our servers and storage systems 24/7 to keep your data secure. Our tamper-evident technology ensures your documents are protected and synced securely in the cloud.

### Does Xodo Sign work on my Mac, PC and mobile device?

Yes. Xodo Sign is a web-based application that lets you edit and sign documents on Mac, PC, and mobile devices with an internet connection. For mobile workflows, download the Xodo app for [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.xodo.pdf.reader&hl=en_CA&gl=US) or [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/xodo-pdf/id805075929) to access additional features on the go.

### Who's there when I need help?

Our support team is here to help whenever you need it. If you have questions, need technical assistance, or want guidance on getting started with Xodo Sign, visit our [Help Center](https://help.eversign.com/support/home) to get in touch with us.

![Visit the Xodo Sign Help Center](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/687f66800b85e8425ceb6cfc/68aec54855801c1b626793c9_Frame%201000007926.webp)

## More Questions?

The Xodo Sign platform comes with an extensive Help-Center focused on answering any questions you may have — maybe even before you have them.

[Explore Help Center](https://help.eversign.com/support/home)

## Try Xodo Sign Professional for 7 days 100% FREE!

Sign up today and try all features of Xodo Sign Professional Plan (normally $32 per user billed monthly).

Send unlimited documents to an unlimited number of signers! Invite colleagues to use your trial too.

**Explore Xodo Sign Professional Free - No credit card required!**

[Sign Up Free Now](https://eversign.com/trial?utm_source=pricing_page_popup)

# Eversign

Eversign is a comprehensive electronic signature and document management platform that streamlines the process of creating, sending, and signing digital documents securely.

![Eversign Demo - e-Signature](https://www.dimmo.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimage.mux.com%2FaW9STIZljUFDhceksppC00tbKHFXLkBg4kyd01eeSD01so%2Fthumbnail.webp&w=2048&q=75)

Compare with... [Ask My Network](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/?shareActive=true&text=Hey!%20I%E2%80%99ve%20been%20looking%20at%20Eversign%20on%20Dimmo.%20Has%20anyone%20used%20it%3F%20Would%20love%20to%20hear%20your%20thoughts!%0A%0A%0A%20https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dimmo.ai%2Fproducts%2FEversign)

## Eversign Demo - e-Signature

Demo Summary

In this video, Matthew shows how to use Eversign, an app for signing legal papers online. You’ll see the price plans and how to start a free trial. He shows how to make and save a signature. You learn to upload a document, add signers, place signature spots, and send it. Eversign solves slow paper signing. It keeps documents secure, paperless, and helps businesses save time and trees.

AI-Detected Features

### AI DetectedClick on a feature to jump to that section

[Introduction & OverviewMatthew welcomes viewers, introduces Eversign, and outlines the video: pros and cons, pricing, and a live document signing demo.\\
\\
00:00](https://www.dimmo.ai/products/Eversign?t=0) [What Is Eversign?An explanation of Eversign as a digital signature platform that lets you securely approve, sign, and deliver legal documents online.\\
\\
00:24](https://www.dimmo.ai/products/Eversign?t=24) [Key Business BenefitsHow Eversign enables true paperless workflows, safeguards contracts in the cloud, and scales from small teams to large enterprises.\\
\\

\\

\\

\\

\\

\\

\\

\\
05:05](https://www.dimmo.ai/products/Eversign?t=305)

## Intro

Eversign, now operating as Xodo Sign following its acquisition by Apryse, has established itself as a competitive player in the electronic signature market. This review will help you discover how Xodo Sign performs against competitors, understand its security and compliance standards, and determine if it matches your organization's digital signature requirements. We'll analyze everything from small business workflows to enterprise-level document management needs.

## Company Overview

**• Founded:** 2017 as Eversign by eversign GmbH (Vienna-based technology company)

**• Current Name:** Xodo Sign (following 2022 acquisition)

**• Parent Company:** Apryse

**• User Base:** Over 4 million daily active users globally

Eversign began with a mission to replace paperwork with secure, affordable electronic signatures. When Apryse acquired Eversign in 2022, they expanded beyond basic e-signatures. The platform now serves everyone from freelancers to Fortune 500 companies needing legally valid signatures across multiple countries.

## Pricing Analysis

The Eversign platform offers enterprise-level features at competitive rates, making it attractive for small and medium businesses that need professional e-signature capabilities without premium costs.

### **Free Plan**

• Limited monthly document signings

• Basic electronic signature functionality

### **Business Plans**

• Increased document limits

• Advanced workflow management

• Enhanced integrations with business tools

### **Enterprise Solutions**

• Unlimited document processing

• Advanced security features

• Custom integration support

Eversign offers a free trial period and remains significantly cheaper than premium competitors like DocuSign, despite some users mentioning pricing increases over time.

## Benefits

Eversign delivers operational advantages that impact business document efficiency. The platform balances robust security with user-friendly design, offering a cost-effective alternative to premium solutions without sacrificing professional capabilities.

• **Multi-party signing with seamless tracking**

**• Flexible signature options and authentication methods**

**• Cost-effective pricing for small to medium businesses**

**• Strong legal compliance and security standards**

**• Automated workflow management and reminders**

**• Comprehensive integration ecosystem**

**• User-friendly interface with minimal learning curve**

**Multi-party signing with seamless tracking**

The platform streamlines complex approval workflows with customizable signing order. The dashboard provides visibility into document status, reducing bottlenecks through transparent tracking — essential for organizations in legal, HR, and contract-heavy industries.

**Flexible signature options and authentication methods**

Choose from typing, drawing, uploading images, or saved preferences. The system offers SMS or PIN verification with detailed audit trails for enhanced security, providing more flexibility than competitors like Dropbox Sign while ensuring legal validation.

**Cost-effective pricing for small to medium businesses**

Positioned as an affordable alternative to enterprise solutions like DocuSign, Eversign delivers high-end features without premium costs. This structure provides sufficient functionality for most SMB needs while maintaining competitive rates.

**Automated workflow management and reminders**

Automated document routing and status notifications improve efficiency by eliminating human error in document management.

**Comprehensive integration ecosystem**

Connects with popular applications including Google Drive, Dropbox, and Salesforce. Supports API integration for custom workflows, offers no-code automation through Zapier, and enables seamless document management within existing business systems.

User-friendly interface with minimal learning curve

The intuitive design accommodates both beginners and advanced users.

See Detailed Breakdown

## Features

Eversign delivers a comprehensive suite of electronic signature features designed to streamline your document workflows while maintaining the highest security standards. The platform combines intuitive signing capabilities with robust automation tools, making it equally suitable for individual professionals and enterprise teams managing complex multi-party agreements.

**•** **Multi-Party Signing and Tracking**

**• Flexible Signature Options**

**• Advanced Authentication and Security**

**• Document Workflow Automation**

**• Template Management System**

**• API and Integration Capabilities**

**• Cloud Storage Connectivity**

### **Multi-Party Signing and Tracking**

Track multiple signers' status from a central dashboard with real-time updates. Configure sequential signing when approval order matters or parallel signing for faster completion. Automatic notifications keep everyone informed without manual follow-up.

### **Flexible Signature Options**

Sign your way — type, draw, upload, or use saved signatures from any device. Customize with various field types including initials, checkboxes, and date fields to create comprehensive agreements that meet all your documentation needs.

### **Document Workflow Automation**

Set effective automatic reminders with a 97% user satisfaction rate. Schedule agreements to send at optimal times and create event-triggered signing processes. Send documents in bulk to eliminate repetitive manual tasks.

### **Template Management System**

Save time with reusable templates featuring autofill capabilities for text and data fields. Share templates across your organization for consistency and organize with version control and template libraries.

### **Cloud Storage Connectivity**

Integrate directly with Google Drive, Dropbox, Box, and OneDrive. Automatically save signed documents to your preferred cloud storage while maintaining consistent folder structures and export in multiple formats with embedded signatures.

## Integrations Ecosystem

Eversign seamlessly connects with your existing tools, eliminating isolated systems and creating automated workflows that accelerate signature processes across your business.

**• CRM Platforms** – Salesforce, Zoho, and custom CRM systems.

**• Cloud Storage**– Google Drive, Dropbox, Box, OneDrive.

**• Productivity Suites** – Google Docs and Office 365.

**• No-Code Automation** – Zapier and Relay.app connections.

**• Custom Development**– Full REST API for tailored integrations.

**• HR Management** – Streamlined onboarding workflows.

**• Industry-Specific Tools**– Real estate, healthcare, and legal platforms.

**CRM Integration Benefits**

Trigger signature requests automatically when deals reach specific pipeline stages. Zapier integration connects Eversign with third-party services you're already using, with triggers and automations that automatically send templates for signature when deals update in your CRM and upload completed documents directly to cloud storage. Signed documents instantly attach to customer records.

**Cloud Storage Automation**

Documents automatically sync with your preferred storage solution, maintaining organized file structures without manual intervention. Completed signatures flow directly into designated folders in Google Drive, Dropbox, or other platforms, preserving your existing organizational systems.

**No-Code Workflow Building**

Create sophisticated multi-step automations without developers using Zapier and Relay.app. When a new hire accepts an offer, their onboarding documents can automatically generate, route for signature, and file into appropriate systems.

**API Development Capabilities**

For custom needs, Eversign provides a comprehensive JSON-based REST API supporting multi-tenant environments. Developers can embed signature workflows directly into existing applications, eliminating platform switching.

**Industry-Specific Applications**

Eversign integration allows you to email signature-required documents directly from within individual records, supporting specialized platforms for real estate closings, HIPAA-compliant healthcare consents, and legal documentation.

See Detailed Breakdown

## Security and Compliance

Eversign provides enterprise-grade security and regulatory compliance for organizations handling sensitive documents. The platform combines robust security controls with comprehensive legal framework support, ensuring signatures meet industry requirements and withstand legal scrutiny.

**• SOC 2 Type 1 Certified**\- Meets strict security, availability, and privacy controls.

**• HIPAA-Supporting Features** \- Includes encryption, detailed logging, and access controls for healthcare organizations.

**• GDPR Compliance Support**\- Offers Data Processing Agreement and impact assessment assistance.

**• Legal Framework Coverage**\- Complies with ESIGN, UETA, and eIDAS regulations for binding signatures.

**• Tamper-Evident Security** \- Cryptographic protection flags unauthorized document changes.

**• Comprehensive Audit Trails** \- Records every action with timestamps, IP addresses, and user details.

**Enterprise Security Standards**

Eversign has achieved SOC 2 Type 1 certification, validating its platform meets rigorous controls for security and privacy. This certification streamlines vendor assessment for enterprise customers while the company prepares for more comprehensive SOC 2 Type 2 certification.

**Healthcare and Privacy Requirements**

Eversign provides HIPAA-supporting features including encryption and access controls for regulated industries. The platform supports GDPR requirements through its Data Processing Agreement, maintaining obligations under European data protection law.

**Legal Validity and Authentication**

Documents signed through Eversign maintain legal validity under ESIGN, UETA, and eIDAS regulations. The platform employs SMS and PIN verification for signer authentication and creates tamper-evident documents with comprehensive audit trails—essential elements for legal proceedings and regulatory compliance.

See Detailed Breakdown

## Customer Support and Resources

Eversign provides support channels and documentation to help users implement electronic signature workflows effectively. While direct customer service could improve in responsiveness, the platform offers comprehensive self-service resources.

• Help center with legal and compliance documentation.

• API documentation for developers.

• Knowledge base articles covering platform features.

• Legal resources including terms of service and privacy policies.

• HIPAA and security compliance guides.

**Help Center and Documentation**

Eversign's help center addresses key questions about legal compliance and functionality, including detailed guidance on legal binding requirements and HIPAA compliance for regulated industries.

**Developer and Compliance Resources**

Technical teams benefit from comprehensive API documentation for integration, while legal teams can access data processing agreements for GDPR compliance. Some users note opportunities for improvement in customer service responsiveness, particularly for time-sensitive account inquiries.

## Pros

• Intuitive, user-friendly interface.

• Comprehensive multi-party signing with tracking.

• Cost-effective compared to enterprise competitors.

• Robust security with SMS/PIN verification and audit trails.

• Multiple signature options (typed, drawn, uploaded).

• Automated reminder system.

• Strong legal compliance frameworks.

• Extensive third-party integrations.

**User Experience Excellence**

The platform's intuitive design reduces learning curves, enabling faster implementation and higher adoption rates across organizations.

**Multi-Party Workflow Management**

Handles complex signing scenarios while maintaining clear visibility, eliminating bottlenecks in multi-approval documents.

**Cost-Effective Solution**

Delivers essential e-signature functionality at lower price points than enterprise competitors like DocuSign without sacrificing security.

See Detailed Breakdown

## Cons

**Enterprise Feature Limitations**

Lacks advanced capabilities found in robust solutions, potentially necessitating platform migrations for growing organizations.

See Detailed Breakdown

## Best fit for:

Employee Count: 1-1,000+

Location: Global

Industries: Diverse, including Technology, Financial Services, Healthcare, Real Estate, Legal, and Professional Services

Job Titles: HR Director/Manager Sales Director Small Business Owner/Entrepreneur Chief Information Officer (CIO) Operations Manager

## Company Summary

Eversign, now known as Xodo Sign, is a company that helps people and businesses sign documents online. Instead of using paper and pen, you can sign contracts and agreements on your computer or phone. This makes it faster and easier to handle important paperwork.

## Price Estimate

Xodo Sign offers several pricing plans:

- **Free Plan**: Sign up to 3 documents per month and use 1 template.
- **Basic Plan**: For $9.99 per month (billed yearly), you get unlimited documents and 3 templates.
- **Professional Plan**: At $39.99 per month (billed yearly), this plan includes unlimited documents, 10 templates, and supports up to 5 users.
- **Professional Plus Plan**: For $99.99 per month (billed yearly), it offers unlimited documents, 25 templates, and supports up to 15 users.
- **Enterprise Plan**: Custom pricing tailored to your needs.

For more details, visit their pricing page. ( [eversign.com](https://eversign.com/pricing?utm_source=openai))

## Who is Eversign for?

Xodo Sign is designed for a wide range of users:

- **Company Size**: Suitable for individuals, small and medium-sized businesses, and large enterprises.
- **Job Titles**: Common users include:
  - Business Owners
  - Sales Managers
  - HR Professionals
  - Legal Advisors
  - Financial Officers
- **Industries**: Serves various industries such as:
  - Finance
  - Legal
  - Sales
  - Human Resources
  - Technology

## Features, Functionalities, and Benefits

Xodo Sign offers several key features:

- **Electronic Signatures**: Sign documents securely from any device.
- **Document Editor**: Edit, send, and sign documents quickly.
- **Templates**: Create reusable templates for frequently used documents.
- **In-Person Signing**: Allow clients to sign documents directly on your device.
- **App Integrations**: Connect with apps like Google Drive, Dropbox, and more.
- **High-Level Security**: Your data is encrypted using 256-bit SSL for safety.
- **Audit Trail**: Keep track of all document activities for transparency.

## Use Cases

Companies use Xodo Sign for various purposes:

- **Financial Department**: Manage NDAs, employment contracts, and asset purchase agreements.
- **Legal Department**: Handle retention agreements, shareholder agreements, and merger documents.
- **Sales Department**: Process new hire paperwork, price quotes, and sales proposals.
- **HR Department**: Oversee NDAs, employment contracts, and independent contractor agreements.

For more details, visit their website.

## Who Are Their Best Customers?

Xodo Sign serves a diverse range of customers, including individuals, small businesses, and large enterprises. While specific customer stories are not provided, the platform is tailored to meet the needs of various industries and company sizes.

## What Makes Eversign Different?

Xodo Sign stands out by offering a user-friendly platform that integrates seamlessly with popular apps, provides high-level security, and supports various signing methods, including in-person signing. This flexibility and ease of use make it a preferred choice for many businesses.

## Legal Info:

For legal information, you can refer to Xodo Sign’s Privacy Policy and Terms of Service on their website.

More Demos(1)

Stay up to date

- [Twitter(@geteversign)](https://x.com/XodoPDF)

Setting up Embedded Signing will enable you to have your signers sign documents directly on your website using an iFrame. All you need is your [API Access Key](https://eversign.com/api/documentation#api-access-key), a server-side signature request and our JavaScript library for the client side.

## Server Side

The first step to embedding a signature page on your website is deciding whether to use an existing document or to create a new one.

**Use existing document:** If you already have a document for which Embedded Signing is enabled, all you need to do is fetch the respective document's signing URLs using a standard [Get Document](https://eversign.com/api/documentation/methods#get-document-template) call from the Xodo Sign API.

### How do I know Embedded Signing is enabled?

When fetching your document using the API, check whether the document's embedded\_signing\_enabled object is set to 1. If not, this document cannot be embedded.

**Create new document:** If the document you would like to embed has not been created yet, you will be required to either create a new document ( [Create Document](https://eversign.com/api/documentation/methods#create-document)) or create a document from a template ( [Use Template](https://eversign.com/api/documentation/methods#use-template)).

### Important

When creating a new document or creating a document from a template, please ensure the [embedded\_signing\_enabled](https://eversign.com/api/documentation/embedded-signing#) parameter is set to 1 in your API request. Only then your new document will be eligible for Embedded Signing.

### Get Embedded Signing URLs

HTTP GET

**API Request**

If Embedded Signing is enabled for the document you are requesting, each object contained in the signers array will come with an extra embedded\_signing\_url object containing an Embedded Signing URL for the respective signer.

```plaintext
https://api.eversign.com/document
  ? access_key = YOUR_ACCESS_KEY
  & business_id = 1
  & document_hash = j6yMcaF2gQAIIQ
```

**API Response**

The API response below has been shortened for simplicity purposes. In order to see how the full response looks like, please jump to the [Get Document](https://eversign.com/api/documentation/methods#get-document-template) section.

```php
{
  "document_hash": "A4X5GeinpUtjhz",
  [...]
  "signers": [{\
    "id": 1,\
    [...]\
    "embedded_signing_url": "https://business.eversign.com/document/A4X5GeinpUtjhz-Ffsl2DkD1fkuu2/sign"\
  }, {\
    "id": 2,\
    [...]\
    "embedded_signing_url": "https://business.eversign.com/document/A4X5GeinpUtjhz-S2f3fEl23dtjFd/sign"\
  }],
  [...]
}
```

## Client Side

After retrieving your Embedded Signing URLs the next and final step is embedding an iFrame on your website. In order to make this as easy as possible, we've built a JavaScript library that places the iFrame into a DOM object of your choice and allows for customization.

To get started, include the following code on your website:

```javascript
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://static.eversign.com/js/embedded-signing.js"></script>
```

Once you have included the JavaScript library on your website, simply include the following code and specify all required options to display your iFrame.

```javascript
eversign.open({
  url: "YOUR_EMBEDDED_SIGNING_URL",
  containerID: "container",
  width: 600,
  height: 600,
  events: {
    loaded: function () {
      console.log("loaded Callback");
    },
    signed: function () {
      console.log("signed Callback");
    },
    declined: function () {
      console.log("declined Callback");
    },
    error: function () {
      console.log("error Callback");
    }
  }
});
```

The eversign.open function comes with a number of parameters:

| Parameter | Description |
| --- | --- |
| url | This is where the Embedded Signing URL you retrieved earlier is placed. |
| containerID | The ID of a DOM object on your website which your iFrame will be placed into. (e.g. myTable for <table id="myTable">) |
| width | The width of your iFrame in pixels. |
| height | The height of your iFrame in pixels. |
| events.loaded | Callback function triggered when the iFrame has finished loading. |
| events.signed | Callback function triggered when the document has been signed. |
| events.declined | Callback function triggered when the document has been declined. |
| events.error | Callback function triggered when the iFrame or document failed loading. |

[Embedded Requesting](https://eversign.com/api/documentation/embedded-requesting)
